segments.speaker: LUKAS
segments.text: one of them, but if there's something that you're completely finished with, like actually deleting it.

segments.speaker: LUKAS
segments.text: Because it's hard for one person to go through and see which ones are supposed to be finished if they haven't worked on them themselves.

segments.speaker: LUKAS
segments.text: And I'll merge the pipeline MVP to main and then make a new branch that we can work on for.

segments.speaker: LUKAS
segments.text: You know, continued development, I guess.
